name: Castle of the Forgotten
text: Reaction: After you break a province, bow this stronghold – each conflict declared this round is [mil] instead of its normal type.

name: Offerings to the Kami
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose a ring in the unclaimed ring pool – resolve that ring's effects and claim it as a ring, gaining all fate on it.

name: Deserted Shrine
text: Reaction: After this province is revealed, choose a deck – discard the top 10 cards of that deck.

name: Repentant Legion
text:
No attachments except Weapon.
Reaction: After you break a province during a conflict in which this character is participating – fill each of your non-stronghold provinces with 1 facedown dynasty card.

name: Asahina Peacekeeper
text:
Seeker role only.
Limited.
As an additional cost for a player to declare a character as an attacker during a [mil] conflict, that player must discard 1 card from their hand.

name: Fū Sui Temple
text: During [pol] conflicts, each participating character gains pride.

name: Militant Faithful
text:
No attachments except Heresy or Weapon.
This character does not bow as the result of conflict resolution during conflicts in which an opponent controls a participating honored or dishonored character.

name: Conduit of Heroes
text: Action: During a conflict, bow this character unless you have at least 5 more honor than an opponent. Choose another character – until the end of the conflict, that character gets +3 [mil], +1 [pol] and +1 glory.

name: Kami of Ancient Wisdom
text:
No attachments except Spell or Spirit.
Reaction: After 1 or more fate is removed from a character outside the fate phase, choose a character and select one – either place 1 fate on the chosen character or remove 1 fate from it.

name: Shosuro Deceiver
text: While this character is participating in a conflict it gains each triggered ability on each other participating dishonored character.

name: Display of Loyalty
text: Action: Choose a character with the most fate on it among characters in play – dishonor that character.

name: Open Field Skirmisher
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is attacking, remove 1 fate from this character – the attacked province gets -3 strength until the end of the conflict.

name: Higashi Kaze Company
text:
No attachments except Weapon.
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose another participating character with no fate on it – that character does not bow as the result of this conflict's resolution.

name: Battle Meditation
text: Reaction: After you break a province during a conflict, if you control a participating Berserker character – draw 3 cards. (Max 1 per conflict.)

name: Tsangusuri Ward
text:
Play only on a character you control, and only if you control a Shugenja character.
Opponents cannot play attachments on attached character.

name: Phoenix Tattoo
text:
Fire role only.
Attach to a character you control. Attached character gains the Tattooed trait.
Restricted.
While attached character is participating in a conflict, each other participating character gains pride.

name: Betrayal of Truth
text: Reaction: During a conflict – bow each participating honored or dishonored character.

name: Ancestral Sight
text:
Attach to a Shugenja character.
Attached character gains: "Action: Put a character in your discard pile on the bottom of your dynasty deck. Choose a copy of that character in play – move 1 fate from your fate pool to that character."

name: Battlefield Orders
text:
If you have at least 5 more honor than an opponent, reduce the cost to play this card by 1.
Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose an action ability on a participating character – that character's controller resolves that ability.

name: Calling the Storm
text: Action: Discard your hand – until the end of the phase, you may look at and play the top card of your conflict deck as if it were in your hand.

name: Final Whisper
text:
Air role only.
Reaction: After an opponent's character receives a status token, that opponent chooses another character they control – the chosen character receives the same status token as well.

name: Overrun
text:
Limited.
Reaction: After you break a province, choose a province controlled by the same opponent – place a dishonored status token on that province and reveal it, if able. While a province has a dishonored status token, treat its printed text box as if it were blank (except for Traits).
